title: Add student profile customization page

requirements.text: Create a dedicated student profile page route at /profile where authenticated users can view and edit their complete profile information including name, email, and college details

quotes: Add a app student profile student can change or customize student profile

acceptanceCriteria: Profile page is accessible via /profile route
Page displays current user profile information (name, email, college)
Page includes editable form fields for all profile properties
Form pre-populates with existing user data from useGetCallerUserProfile hook
Save button triggers useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation
Success message displays after successful profile update
Page redirects to login if user is not authenticated

requirements.text: Add a navigation link to the profile page in the Layout header navigation menu, positioned near the UserProfileDisplay component
acceptanceCriteria: Profile link appears in header navigation when user is authenticated
Link navigates to /profile route
Link is visually consistent with existing navigation styling
Link is hidden when user is not logged in

requirements.text: Enhance the backend UserProfile type to support optional additional customizable fields such as bio, year of study, and department, updating saveCallerUserProfile and getCallerUserProfile methods accordingly
acceptanceCriteria: UserProfile type includes optional bio, year, and department fields
saveCallerUserProfile accepts and stores new profile fields
getCallerUserProfile returns all profile fields including new optional ones
Existing profile data is preserved during upgrade
Profile migration logic handles existing profiles without new fields

requirements.text: Update the profile page UI to include form fields for the new customizable profile properties (bio, year of study, department) with appropriate input types and validation
acceptanceCriteria: Bio field uses textarea input with character limit (e.g., 300 characters)
Year of study uses dropdown or number input
Department uses text input
All new fields are optional and clearly marked
Form validation provides helpful error messages
Save button remains disabled until form is valid

constraints: Do not modify immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Maintain single-actor backend architecture in backend/main.mo
Use existing useSaveCallerUserProfile and useGetCallerUserProfile hooks for profile operations
Preserve existing UserProfile data structure compatibility
nonGoals: Social features like following other students
Public profile pages viewable by other users
Email verification or change email workflow
